function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-23T16:35:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Nina,

Sure — I’ve attached the invoice dated 2025-10-28 from Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write is final and appears valid: attachment path was read earlier, single attachment so ordering rule satisfied, recipient matches canonical entity email, subject with colon-space is quoted. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item; file was previously read.

function.message: Processed the next inbox request by preparing an outbound invoice resend draft to Nina with the exact requested 2025-10-28 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), system workflow reads, inbox/email processing rules, canonical sender verification via entity primary_contact_email, and inbox cleanup rule after completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox email (00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md) asked to resend the 2025-10-28 Nordstern invoice. Sender header from nina@finance-workflow.example was verified against canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. The exact requested invoice exists at 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_28__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md and was attached in outbound draft 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-23T16-35-00Z.md. Inbox item was then deleted per inbox-processing workflow.
